subcodes.title: Words to Shaykh Salih, spoken on 1915-01-11
subcodes.first_line: Because you are so frightened, your dreams are also disturbed. Your situation is like the story of the man who would attend rawdih-khanís
subcodes.first_line_orig: از بس میترسی خوابهایت هم مغشوش و مشوش است مثل قصه آن شخص میماند که در روضه
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @accounts of dreams and visions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
